render_readiness_checks: GPU is visible to ChimeraX render pipeline (offscreen still benefits from GPU)
A render command file or saved ChimeraX session is recorded with the dossier artifacts
All upstream map/model outputs are aggregated under /workspace/cryocore/runs/<run-id>
notes: Distinct from chimerax.license-gate.v1.json (the upstream gate probe). The .ready variant assumes the operator has confirmed noncommercial use or recorded a commercial license override and adds CryoCore dossier render-readiness checks. Status remains gated; operator must clear noncommercial confirmation before promotion.
